flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 21% at Southwestern Oklahoma State University vs the 2003–2007 baseline (3.5k vs 4.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Southwestern Oklahoma State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Southwestern Oklahoma State University fell 43% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.0k → $8.5k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Southwestern Oklahoma State University rose 31% between 2021 and 2024 (20.3% → 26.6%).
